scripts.setup: cd vendor/pocketjs && bun install && cd ../.. && mkdir -p node_modules/@pocketjs && ln -sfn ../../vendor/pocketjs node_modules/@pocketjs/framework && ln -sfn ../vendor/pocketjs/node_modules/solid-js node_modules/solid-js && ln -sfn ../vendor/pocketjs/node_modules/bun-types node_modules/bun-types
scripts.check:platforms: bun run typecheck && bun vendor/pocketjs/scripts/pocket.ts check --target psp && bun vendor/pocketjs/scripts/pocket.ts check --target vita
